# The Power Mates

> Dual Microsoft MVPs (Data Platform & AI) helping enterprise teams unlock Microsoft Fabric, Power Platform, and AI. 20+ years of hands-on experience.

## Who We Are

Gastón Cruz and Alex Rostan are Dual Microsoft MVPs co-hosting The Power Mates — an enterprise data and AI channel with 7,300+ subscribers. They deliver consulting, training, and productized services for data-driven organizations.

### Team

- **Gastón Cruz** — Microsoft Data & AI MVP, Data Architect. 20+ years in enterprise data architecture, Microsoft Fabric and Power Platform implementation. FabCon 2026 speaker.
- **Alex Rostan** — Co-Founder, PowerMates. Enterprise Architect specializing in Microsoft 365 governance, Power Platform optimization, and Fabric architecture. FabCon 2026 speaker.

## What We Do

- **Tenant Scan**: Microsoft Fabric tenant health audit. Surfaces workspace sprawl, orphaned lakehouses and semantic models, Spark inefficiencies, and pipelines running without monitoring. Includes a scored health report and prioritized action plan. From $2,500.
- **Fabric Architecture**: Design and implementation of Microsoft Fabric medallion lakehouses, OneLake architecture, and real-time analytics pipelines. End-to-end deployment support.
- **Power Platform Consulting**: Governance frameworks, performance optimization, migration playbooks, and Dataverse architecture for enterprise environments.
- **Semantic Model Audits**: DAX quality review, relationship design, partition strategy, Power BI performance optimization, and best practices analysis.
- **Training & Enablement**: Executive briefings, team workshops, and hands-on labs for Microsoft Fabric and Power Platform adoption.
- **Spark Optimization**: Analyze and tune Spark job performance, partition strategy, and lakehouse efficiency.
- **Pipeline Health Check**: Reliability analysis, bottleneck identification, and optimization recommendations for data pipelines.
- **Migration Playbook**: Structured approach to Power BI to Fabric migration with phased implementation strategy.

## Service Offerings & Pricing

### Audit & Optimization Services (Entry-Level)
- **Tenant Scan** — From $2,500 — Microsoft Fabric tenant health audit with scored report and action plan
- **Semantic Model Audit** — $2,500 — DAX review, data model optimization, performance recommendations
- **Spark Optimization** — $3,500 — Spark job tuning and lakehouse efficiency analysis
- **Pipeline Health Check** — $4,000 — Pipeline reliability and performance optimization review

### Architecture & Implementation (Mid-Level)
- **Fabric Architecture Accelerator** — $15,000 — End-to-end medallion lakehouse design and implementation
- **Migration Playbook** — $12,000 — Structured Power BI to Fabric migration with phased roadmap
- **Real-Time Analytics Accelerator** — $8,000 — Real-time data ingestion and analytics pipeline design

### Enterprise & Advanced (Premium)
- **IQ + MCP Integration** — $18,000 — Advanced integration with Copilot and enterprise models
- **Enterprise Transformation** — Custom — Full-scale Fabric and Power Platform modernization

### Enterprise Bundle
- **All 8 Services Bundle** — $63,000 — Complete enterprise data transformation package

## How to Engage

### Free
- YouTube channel: 7,300+ subscribers learning Fabric and Power Platform
- Weekly tutorials, live demos, and conference recordings
- Community Q&A and engagement
- Start here: https://www.youtube.com/@PowerMatesMS

### Entry-Level ($2,500–$4,000)
- Tenant Scan governance assessments
- Semantic model audits
- Spark optimization reviews
- Pipeline health checks
- Perfect for: Quick assessments and targeted optimizations

### Mid-Level ($8,000–$15,000)
- Fabric Architecture Accelerator — medallion lakehouse design and implementation
- Migration Playbook — Power BI to Fabric migration roadmap
- Real-Time Analytics Accelerator — advanced pipeline design
- Perfect for: Architecture projects and platform migrations

### Premium (Custom)
- IQ + MCP Integration — advanced enterprise automation
- Enterprise Transformation — full-stack Fabric and Power Platform modernization
- Custom engagement models for Fortune 500 and large enterprises
- Perfect for: End-to-end digital transformation

## YouTube Channel

**The Power Mates** (@PowerMatesMS) — 7,300+ subscribers

Weekly content covering:
- Microsoft Fabric tutorials and advanced patterns
- Power Platform governance and optimization
- Real-world data architecture case studies
- Enterprise adoption strategies
- FabCon 2026 session recordings and insights

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@PowerMatesMS

## FabCon 2026 Sessions

Gastón Cruz and Alex Rostan are speaking at Microsoft's flagship Fabric conference:

1. **"Building Next-Gen Apps with Power Platform and SQL Server 2025"** — Enterprise application architecture combining Power Platform's low-code approach with SQL Server's data capabilities.

2. **"The Instant Insights Pipeline: OneLake Shortcuts + Dataverse + Power Apps"** — Real-time analytics pipeline design connecting Dataverse, OneLake, and Power Apps for enterprise insights.
